author: claude
content:
Study additions (Stefan 2026-06-20):
- 4TH DEPLOYMENT VANTAGE: a single chunky server hosted on a UNIVERSITY network. Distinct from datacenter (GCP/AWS), single-domestic, and the volunteer residential swarm — university IPs have their own reputation/egress profile (often institutionally trusted, static, but not residential). So the vantage axis is now: datacenter (GCP/AWS) vs single-domestic vs residential-volunteer-swarm vs university-server.
- ANALYSIS METHODOLOGY: replicate the analysis from the stealth paper (Krumnow, Jonker, Karsch 2022, arXiv:2205.08890 — detectability / reliability / differential treatment of the measurement tool) ACROSS the vantages, to observe how much each vantage is detected/cloaked/served-differently. 'but maybe also more' = extend beyond their detection analysis to the broader tracking/differential measures. Note the leverage: the stealth instrument (#1154) removes the TOOL-detectability confound, so this study can isolate the VANTAGE-POINT effect cleanly — and a 2x2 of instrument(stealth/legacy) x vantage quantifies how much each axis contributes to measured differences.
